name: RiffDiff-ProtFlow
description: Generate backbone fragments from a theozyme to build a motif library. Generate and iteratively refine protein structures using multiple design tools.
capabilities: Generate backbone fragments from a theozyme to build a motif library
Generate and iteratively refine protein structures using multiple design tools

pdbFile.description: Input PDB structure containing theozyme or active site definition

theozymeResidues.description: Theozyme residue positions for motif library generation

numDesigns.description: Number of protein scaffold designs to generate
